title: TestTolF Property
description:
TestTolF Property

TestTolF Property

Applies To

This property sets the tolerance of the force to be the end condition of the tensile force specified by TestForce of the force guide object.

The end condition is the range of

TestForce - TestTolF to TestForce + TestTolF

Value

Minimum value	0.1

Maximum value	10

Default: 1
